Sannel.Encoding.Manager
Table of Contents

Namespace Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake

Classes

AudioTrackInfo

Audio track metadata.

ChapterInfo

Chapter marker metadata.

HandBrakeEncodeResult

Result of a HandBrakeCLI encode operation.

HandBrakeError

Structured failure details from HandBrakeCLI.

HandBrakeExecutable

Resolved HandBrake executable information.

HandBrakeExecutableLocator

Locates the HandBrakeCLI executable on the current platform. Supports direct native installs and Flatpak (Linux).

HandBrakeJob

Describes an encoding request to HandBrakeCLI.

HandBrakeOptions

Configuration options for HandBrake CLI integration. Bound from the "HandBrake" section in appsettings.json.

HandBrakeParser

Stateless parser for HandBrakeCLI output. Prefers JSON scan output; falls back to text parsing.

HandBrakeScanResult

Result of a HandBrakeCLI scan operation.

HandBrakeService

Default implementation of IHandBrakeService. Wraps HandBrakeCLI for scanning and encoding media files.

ProcessResult

Result of running a process to completion.

ProcessRunner

Default implementation of IProcessRunner using System.Diagnostics.Process.

ProgressInfo

Incremental progress updates during encoding.

SubtitleInfo

Subtitle track metadata.

TitleInfo

Per-title metadata from a scan.

VideoStreamInfo

Video stream metadata.

Interfaces

IHandBrakeService

Service for interacting with HandBrakeCLI to scan and encode media files.

IProcessRunner

Abstraction over System.Diagnostics.Process to allow unit testing without spawning real processes.

IScanCacheProvider

Abstraction over disc scan result caching, allowing different implementations (EF Core, in-memory, no-op, etc.).

Made with docfx
